candidates.why: Explicit operating D&A line tied to cost of revenues, but it appears to be a component within the selected parent COGS row 'Cost of Operating Revenue' rather than a separate add-on. It also sits alongside 'Depreciation in Cost of Revenues' and 'Cost of Revenues - Other - Total', which together closely reconcile to total cost of revenues, indicating inclusion in the selected COGS bucket.

Explicit operating D&A line tied to cost of revenues, but it appears to be a component within the selected parent COGS row 'Cost of Operating Revenue' rather than a separate add-on. Together with amortization and 'Cost of Revenues - Other - Total', it closely reconciles to total cost of revenues, indicating it is already embedded in the selected COGS bucket.

variables.notes: Selected COGS row is a total/parent bucket. The separate cost-of-revenues D&A rows appear to be components already included in that total, so adding them separately would double count.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Intangibles in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This is the only SG&A-linked D&A row visible in the operating section, but it appears to be a sub-component of the selected SG&A parent row 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses', not a separate same-level add-on. It also shows no numeric values in the preview.

variables.notes: No separate same-level SG&A D&A row should be added. The visible SG&A amortization row appears embedded within the selected SG&A bucket, and no separate R&D interaction applies because XRD is empty and the selected SG&A row already excludes R&D.
